name: Coinrule
description_short: No-code crypto and stock trading bot with 350+ strategy templates, AI-trained models, and support for 30+ exchanges — built for traders who don't code.
description_long:
Coinrule is a no-code automated trading platform founded in London in 2018 and backed by Y Combinator. It lets traders build rule-based strategies using a visual "if-this-then-that" interface without writing a single line of code. With over 350 pre-built strategy templates and AI models trained on 1.7 million live user strategies, Coinrule significantly lowers the barrier to algorithmic trading for retail users of all skill levels.

The platform supports 30+ centralized cryptocurrency exchanges including Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX, Bybit, KuCoin, and Hyperliquid, as well as on-chain trading on Base, Arbitrum, and Binance Smart Chain. As of February 2026, Coinrule expanded into stocks and ETFs via broker integrations with Alpaca, E*TRADE, Trading 212, and Webull — making it one of the few bots bridging crypto and traditional equities in a single interface.

Security is handled responsibly: exchange connections use API keys scoped to read and trade only (no withdrawal permissions), and all keys are encrypted per user. TradingView webhook integration allows traders to trigger Coinrule rules from TradingView alerts, enabling signal-based automation without a public API. A full mobile app for iOS and Android includes push notifications, an emergency stop button accessible from the lock screen, and biometric security.

Pricing spans from a free Starter plan (2 live rules, 1 exchange, $3K monthly volume) to a $449.99/mo Pro plan with a dedicated server and $5M monthly volume cap. The Trader plan at $59.99/mo is the sweet spot for active users and includes unlimited templates, 3 exchanges, and a 1-on-1 training session. All paid plans come with a 14-day money-back guarantee.
pros: No-code visual rule builder makes automation accessible without any programming skills
350+ pre-built strategy templates covering diverse market conditions and asset types
Supports 30+ crypto exchanges plus stocks and ETFs via multiple broker integrations
AI models trained on 1.7M+ live strategies provide data-driven starting points
Full mobile app with emergency stop, push notifications, and biometric security
cons: Pro plan at $449.99/mo is prohibitively expensive for most retail traders
Free tier is severely limited with only 2 rules and a $3K monthly volume cap
No historical backtesting — demo mode uses real market data only, not historical data
No public API; programmatic control is only possible via TradingView webhooks
best_for: active traders managing crypto and stocks
